  "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "For 'clean this up,' should I (A) do sentence- and paragraph-level polish only (grammar, clarity, concision) without reordering or changing claims; (B) also reorganize section/paragraph structure and tighten claim wording while keeping core content intact; or (C) go further to reframe the thesis/gap and adjust the argument flow?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, clarity, and concision edits without altering content.",
    "RX.1": "Because the request is vague and the artifact uses cautious language, any cleanup should preserve and clearly communicate uncertainty rather than assert stronger claims.",
    "RX.2": "Edits must avoid introducing stronger or broader claims than the artifact supports.",
    "RX.3": "Work should remain within the editing scope and not add or remove substantive content unless explicitly requested.",
    "RX.4": "Rewording should not mislead readers about safety, performance, or deployment costs, which could cause downstream harm.",
    "RX.5": "Maintain traceability to the original text (e.g., via tracked changes) so claims and sources remain attributable."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: For 'clean this up,' should I (A) do sentence- and paragraph-level polish only (grammar, clarity, concision) without reordering or changing claims; (B) also reorganize section/paragraph structure and tighten claim wording while keeping core content intact; or (C) go further to reframe the thesis/gap and adjust the argument flow?

rationale.R1.6: The request most directly implies sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, clarity, and concision edits without altering content.
rationale.RX.1: Because the request is vague and the artifact uses cautious language, any cleanup should preserve and clearly communicate uncertainty rather than assert stronger claims.
rationale.RX.2: Edits must avoid introducing stronger or broader claims than the artifact supports.
rationale.RX.3: Work should remain within the editing scope and not add or remove substantive content unless explicitly requested.
rationale.RX.4: Rewording should not mislead readers about safety, performance, or deployment costs, which could cause downstream harm.
rationale.RX.5: Maintain traceability to the original text (e.g., via tracked changes) so claims and sources remain attributable.
